name: Immersive View
description: Button to hide uneccesary information, providing an immersive experience  (customizable).

name: Immersive View (Historical)
description: Button to hide uneccesary information, providing an immersive experience  (customizable). (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: NPV Ambience
description: Adds a colorful glow behind the Now Playing View image.

name: NPV Ambience (Historical)
description: Adds a colorful glow behind the Now Playing View image. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Pixelated Images
description: Convert images into a pseudo pixel art.

description: Convert images into a pseudo pixel art. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Toggle DJ
description: Toggle 'Your DJ' in the 'Library' section of settings.

description: Toggle 'Your DJ' in the 'Library' section of settings. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Gamepad
description: Use any gamepad to control Spotify (minus text input).

name: Gamepad (Historical)
description: Use any gamepad to control Spotify (minus text input). (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Spotify Backup
description: Backup / restore application data (settings) + to the cloud (Gist).

name: Spotify Backup (Historical)
description: Backup / restore application data (settings) + to the cloud (Gist). (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: No Controls
description: Removes the titlebar, (Spotify >= 1.2.32). F8 to re enable

name: No Controls (Historical)
description: Removes the titlebar, (Spotify >= 1.2.32). F8 to re enable (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Playbar Clock
description: Current system time on the playbar, with display options.

description: Current system time on the playbar, with display options. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Quick Queue
description: Adds a button to the tracklist to add/remove a song from the queue or play next.

name: Quick Queue (Historical)
description: Adds a button to the tracklist to add/remove a song from the queue or play next. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Scannables
description: View a scannable code for any track or playlist (like mobile).

description: View a scannable code for any track or playlist (like mobile). (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

description: Pause playback after a certain amount of time (like mobile). (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)

name: Tracks To Edges

description: Quickly move multiple tracks to the top/bottom (edges) of a playlist. (Tuned for a specific Spotify/Spicetify version setup in the GitHub README. Will not receive updates.)
